memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  Count of Vienne, Macon and Burgundy, 1096.  Crusader; died on the 1st Crusade.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice de Lorraine於大約1060年出生在法國洛萊時，她的父親Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz42歲，母親Hadwide de  Namur37歲。她於1080年與Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1117年在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrice de Lorraine于大约1060年出生在法国洛萊时，她的父亲Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz42岁，母亲Hadwide de  Namur37岁。她于1080年与Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1117年在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice de Lorraine was born about 1060, in Lorraine, France, her father, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, was 42 and her mother, Hadwide de  Namur, was 37. She married Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne in 1080, in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1117, in Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice de Lorraine est née environ 1060, à Lorraine, France, son père, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Hadwide de  Namur, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne en 1080, à Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1117, à Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice de Lorraine um 1060 in Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz 42 und ihre Mutter Hadwide de  Namur 37. Sie hat 1080 in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1117 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Lorraine è nata il circa 1060 nel Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Hadwide de  Namur, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne nel 1080, nel Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1117, nel Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Lorraineが約1060年にフランスロレィヌで生まれた時，父Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metzは42歳，母Hadwide de  Namurは37歳であった。1080年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアームaコンでÉtienne Ier comte de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1117年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Lorraine(이)가 대략 1060년 프랑스 로레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hadwide de  Namur(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1080년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 a콘에서 Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1117년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Lorraine nasceu aproximadamente 1060, em Lorraine, França, seu pai, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Hadwide de  Namur, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne em 1080, em Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1117, em Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice de Lorraine родилась около 1060 г. в местности лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Hadwide de  Namur, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne в 1080 г. в местности мaкон, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1117 г. в местности саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrice de Lorraine nació aproximadamente 1060, en Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Hadwide de  Namur, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Étienne Ier comte de Bourgogne en 1080, en Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1117, en Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
